{
  "claims": [
    "Carlos Eduardo Arevalo Carranza has been charged with the brutal murder of a San Jose woman.",

    "Carranza had been previously deported by Homeland Security before returning to California.",

    "U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement placed six detainers for Carranza, which were ignored due to sanctuary laws.",
